retrieval.query_summary: Friday late-session block, global rejection rules, XAUUSD bearish setups

factors.name: Macro Bias Alignment
factors.notes: Hawkish Fed Chair Warsh sworn in, supporting USD and pressuring Gold.

factors.name: HTF Trend Alignment
factors.notes: D1 down to H3 are bearish.

factors.name: MTF Trend Alignment
factors.notes: M30 down to M1 are bearish.

factors.notes: M1/M5 bearish OBs and FVGs are present.

factors.name: Friday Late-Session Block
factors.notes: VIOLATED (MR-REJECT-004). Current time is Friday 20:44 UTC, well after the 12:00 UTC cutoff.

cot_signal.summary: Neutral speculative positioning due to missing TFF data.

raw_response.explainable_reasoning: The market is currently in a strong bearish trend across both HTF (D1, H12, H8, H6, H4, H3) and LTF (M30, M15, M5, M1) timeframes. Gold (XAUUSD) is experiencing downward pressure due to a highly bullish USD bias following the swearing-in of hawkish Fed Chair Kevin Warsh. At the live edge (20:44 UTC), multiple high-quality bearish setups have printed on M1 and M5, including a SH+BMS+FVG+RTO bearish candidate on M1 (entry at 4506.665, SL at 4508.273) and a CHOCH+BMS+RTO bearish candidate on M5. However, because the current time is Friday at 20:44 UTC, the Friday late-session block rule (MR-REJECT-004) is active. This rule strictly prohibits any new entries after 12:00 UTC on Friday for Scalping and Intraday styles to avoid weekend gap risks and low late-session liquidity. Therefore, the system remains highly disciplined, rejects the setups, and outputs NO SETUP.

htf_bias.notes: D1, H12, H8, H6, H4, and H3 are all strongly bearish, confirming dominant institutional order flow is short.

evidence.content_preview: Metals (XAU/USD) inverse correlation with DXY. Bearish DXY = bullish Gold bias.
Kevin Warsh sworn in as Fed Chair, described as most hawkish Fed nominee in 20 years.

mtf_bias.notes: M30, M15, M5, and M1 are bearish, aligning with the HTF trend.

evidence.content_preview: Friday late-session block: After 12:00 UTC Friday (Scalping/Intraday) -> ACTION: NO SETUP.

stop_loss.reason: Friday late-session block active (MR-REJECT-004). No new entries permitted after 12:00 UTC Friday.

evidence.content_preview: HTF structure breaking lower in a clear markdown phase.
